text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 17. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
